category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an intuitive find-and-replace CLI; GitHub README describes sd as a find-and-replace CLI and sed alternative.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sd; GitHub repository title and README use sd.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains the quick guide and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/chmln/sd, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies find-and-replace CLI behavior; GitHub README topics include rust, cli, command-line, regex, and text-processing.
